properties.name: konfigyr.crypto.tink.register-legacy-algorithms
properties.description: Whether to register RSA-PKCS1v1.5 signing algorithms (RSA_SSA_PKCS1_3072_SHA256_F4, RSA_SSA_PKCS1_4096_SHA512_F4) for interoperability with systems that require PKCS1v1.5 signatures. These algorithms are conditionally acceptable per NIST SP 800-131A Rev 2 and must not be used in new designs. Prefer RSA_SSA_PSS_3072_SHA256_F4 or RSA_SSA_PSS_4096_SHA512_F4 instead. Defaults to false.
